## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, publishing progress, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production ahead of schedule: 31 articles published (covering weeks 1-2 + calibration)](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Prioritizing content for high-volume keywords and paying customer categories](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [UI/UX improvements planned for article pages and overall blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Technical issues identified: articles not appearing on blog homepage, indexing challenges](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [Exceeded target: 31 articles published (15/week + 3 calibration)](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Covered backlog for weeks 1-2](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Next focus: indexing articles (manual requests planned)](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Prioritizing high-volume keywords, removing low/zero-volume topics (e.g., AI sales software)](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focusing on green-highlighted subcategories (paying customers)](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [New approach: creating supporting articles (features, selection guides) for published comparison pieces](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Targeting tools listed in prioritized buckets (sales, software demos, comparisons, alternatives, reviews)](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

### UI/UX Improvements

  - [Change author names: replacing "Sara Derek" with GrowthX team members](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Redesign article layout:](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Title & metadata on left](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Image right-aligned within header box](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Content starting immediately below header](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Internal linking strategy: hyperlinking mentioned tools to Dimmo demo pages](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

### Product Page Approach

  - [Developing new structure with quick review section (300-word summary)](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Detailed subsections: pricing, benefits, features, cons, use cases, reviews](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Awaiting finalization before potential revamp of existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

### Technical Challenges

  - [Articles not appearing on blog homepage](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Indexing issues due to lack of internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [Site audit planned to identify technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Monitor and manually submit 10 articles/day for indexing](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Finalize and share content topics for next week](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Complete product page skeleton and share for review](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Await Lucas' response on blog homepage linking issue](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Conduct site audit on demo.ite and share findings](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Troy to discuss pushing live product page with Lucas](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Implement UI/UX improvements once approved](https://fathom.video/share/uCukHx6rVqMbbib9y4mZHv43SGBbTPAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
